name: NPS International School Singapore
tagline: Indian heritage with a global IB and Cambridge pathway
description: NPS International School is a leading school offering a blend of Indian and international curricula. Located near Serangoon, NPS provides the CBSE (Indian) curriculum alongside Cambridge IGCSE and the IB Diploma Programme at the senior levels. With around 1,500 students, the school is known for strong academic results and a values-driven approach rooted in Indian educational traditions. NPS has a sister school in Bangalore and is part of the NPS Group of Institutions, one of India's most respected educational networks.

admission.process: Submit an online application with supporting documents. Shortlisted applicants are invited for an entrance assessment and family interview.
admission.deadlines: Rolling admissions. Primary intake in April (Indian academic year) and August (international).

faqs.question: What curricula does NPS offer at the high school level?
faqs.answer: NPS offers both the IB Diploma Programme and Cambridge IGCSE at the senior level, allowing students to choose the pathway that best fits their university goals.

faqs.question: Is NPS only for Indian students?
faqs.answer: No. While NPS has Indian roots and offers CBSE, over 20 nationalities are represented in the student body. The school welcomes students of all backgrounds.

seo.title: NPS International School Singapore — CBSE, IBDP & IGCSE | EduAtlas
seo.description: NPS International School near Serangoon: CBSE Indian curriculum plus IBDP and Cambridge IGCSE. 1,500 students. View 2026 fees, admission info and curriculum pathways.
